blockquote.p: Note to Balloters: Key changes made since FHIR 6.0.0-ballot4:

ul.li:
Non-compatible Changes
FHIR-56099: Renamed codeSystem.version.code to codeSystem.version.value and added codeSystem.versionAlgorithm

Compatible, Substantive Changes
FHIR-53180: Added code system content per version

p.b: All Changes (including Technical Corrections not listed above):

div.p: The TerminologyCapabilities resource provides for a terminology server to describe how the underlying terminology service works.
A client can get the TerminologyCapabilities statement for a Terminology Service by using the capabilities API:
This will return the TerminologyCapabilities resource that applies to the service itself.

ul.li: The TerminologyCapabilities resource does not describe the API - see CapabilityStatement for this.
The CodeSystem resource documents the inherent structure and capabilities of code system, whereas the TerminologyCapabilities resource documents what a server hosting the code system is capable of
